name: Community Marketing Playbook
description: Community Marketing Playbook - Marketing template for growth professionals
instructions: How to Use This Playbook 1. Community Strategy Define your community's mission, target members, growth goals, and success metrics. This is your north star document. 2. Member Tracker Record all community members, their engagement level, contributions, and status. Use this to identify champions and at-risk members. 3. Content Calendar Plan your community content weeks or months in advance. Include discussion topics, polls, AMAs, resources, and spotlights. 4. Event Planner Organize community events – virtual meetups, workshops, hackathons, or conferences. Track attendance and feedback. 5. Ambass
